name: MACROGENICS INC
business: MacroGenics is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative antibody-based therapeutics for the treatment of cancer. It generates product candidates from its proprietary suite of antibody technology platforms, including antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) and multi-specific antibodies (DART and TRIDENT molecules). The company also provides outsourced contract development and manufacturing services to collaborators and other third parties.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing innovative antibody-based therapeutics for the treatment of cancer.

catalysts.event: MGC026 Phase 1 dose escalation study enrollment completed and initial results anticipated
catalysts.sentence: Study enrollment was completed in 2025 and we anticipate sharing the initial results of this trial in mid-2026.
The Company anticipates reporting initial MGC028 clinical data in the second half of 2026.

catalysts.event: Clinical update on first part of LINNET study for lorigerlimab
catalysts.sentence: We expect to provide a clinical update on the first part of the two-stage LINNET study in mid-2026.

catalysts.event: FDA decision on TZIELD for Stage 3 type 1 diabetes
catalysts.sentence: Sanofi subsequently announced that they anticipate an FDA decision for this indication in the first half of 2026.

catalysts.event: FDA target action date for TZIELD supplemental biologics license application to expand age indication
catalysts.sentence: Sanofi has reported that the FDA's target action date for the supplemental application is April 29, 2026.
An Investigational New Drug (IND) application submission to the FDA for MGC030 is targeted for the third quarter of 2026.
